english_first.policy: Board Judge writes English fact/reader cards before shortlist; deterministic builder chooses the translation board; final Russian translation uses compact English cards with legacy full-evidence fallback on any model miss.

translation_memory.policy: Reuse Russian draft_line only when fingerprint and compact fact signature match; changed facts force fresh LLM rewrite.
